product_name: Add Form Face Symbols for Panels in GA Drawing
purpose: Add form face symbols for Panels in GA Drawing.

Content: Adding form face symbol in Marking Plan of Panel GA Drawing is critical for erection.It is quite simple with the application as it automates the process. Select the view and run the application. Since, filter is inbuilt, Panel will only be considered. If the form face changes in the model. It will be updated automatically in the drawing sheet.

download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Bolt Hole Generator under Application and Components.
Let the Application automate the manual process.
